message.content:
Recebi uma recusa da apple, esse foi o review, The following information needs to be included within the app:

- A functional link to the Terms of Use (EULA)

You can use SubscriptionStoreView to easily include all of the required information in the app's purchase flow.

The following information needs to be included in the App Store metadata:

- A functional link to the Terms of Use (EULA). If you are using the standard Apple Terms of Use (EULA), include a link to the Terms of Use in the App Description. If you are using a custom EULA, add it in App Store Connect.

Next Steps

Update the app and App Store metadata to include the information specified above.

Resources

Apps offering auto-renewable subscriptions must include all of the following required information in the app itself:

- Title of auto-renewing subscription (this may be the same as the In-App Purchase product name)
- Length of subscription
- Price of subscription, and price per unit if appropriate
- Functional links to the privacy policy and Terms of Use (EULA), a partir dessa modificação que foi feita, crie uma nova branch, realize o commit e crie o PR com essa modificação para depois mandar para Apple novamente

content.text: O conflito é porque o cherry-pick traz as strings de gamification junto. Para esta branch, preciso apenas das strings de Paywall Legal. Vou resolver mantendo só o que é necessário para a correção da EULA.
Vou resolver os conflitos mantendo apenas as strings de Paywall Legal (sem as de gamification, que pertencem à outra feature).

input.command:
gh pr create --title "fix: add Terms of Use and Privacy Policy links to paywall" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Adds functional Terms of Use (EULA) and Privacy Policy links to the subscription paywall view
- Adds localized strings for paywall legal text (EN + PT-BR)
- Addresses App Store rejection requiring EULA link in-app for auto-renewable subscriptions

## Context
Apple rejected the app because auto-renewable subscription flows must include:
- Title and length of subscription
- Price of subscription
- **Functional links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Use (EULA)**

## Changes
- `OptimizedPaywallView.swift`: Added legal footer with auto-renew disclaimer, Terms of Use link, and Privacy Policy link
- `Localizable.strings` (EN + PT-BR): Added `paywall.legal.auto_renew`, `paywall.legal.terms`, `paywall.legal.privacy` strings

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify Terms of Use link opens correctly in paywall
- [ ] Verify Privacy Policy link opens correctly in paywall
- [ ] Verify auto-renew disclaimer text is visible
- [ ] Test in both EN and PT-BR locales
- [ ] Verify subscription flow still works end-to-end
EOF
)"

gh pr create --title "fix: add Terms of Use and Privacy Policy links to paywall" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Adds functional Terms of Use (EULA) and Privacy Policy links to the subscription paywall view
- Adds localized strings for paywall legal text (EN + PT-BR)
- Addresses App Store rejection requiring EULA link in-app for auto-renewable subscriptions

## Context
Apple rejected the app because auto-renewable subscription flows must include:
- Title and length of subscription
- Price of subscription
- **Functional links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Use (EULA)**

## Changes
- `OptimizedPaywallView.swift`: Added legal footer with auto-renew disclaimer, Terms of Use link, and Privacy Policy link
- `Localizable.strings` (EN + PT-BR): Added `paywall.legal.auto_renew`, `paywall.legal.terms`, `paywall.legal.privacy` strings

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify Terms of Use link opens correctly in paywall
- [ ] Verify Privacy Policy link opens correctly in paywall
- [ ] Verify auto-renew disclaimer text is visible
- [ ] Test in both EN and PT-BR locales
- [ ] Verify subscription flow still works end-to-end
EOF
)" --head fix/app-store-eula-links --base main 2>&1

content.text:
Pronto! Aqui o resumo:

1. Criei a branch `fix/app-store-eula-links` a partir de `main`
2. Cherry-picked o commit `607e516e` com a correção dos links de EULA, resolvendo conflitos (mantendo apenas as strings de Paywall Legal, sem as de gamification)
3. Pushei a branch e criei o PR

**PR**: https://github.com/Viniciuscarvalho/FitToday/pull/105

Depois de aprovado e mergeado, você pode submeter novamente para a Apple.
